additionalPlain:
Vendor Type

When applying, please select the option that best describes your working status.

Are you a Freelancer or Private Individual?
A Freelancer is someone who has a business license and may have a VAT number or EIN for tax purposes. A VAT (Value Added Tax) number is a unique identifier assigned to registered businesses in many countries; an EIN (Employer Identification Number) is a similar identifier used in the US. A Private Individual does not have a business license. If you aren’t sure, you are probably a private individual.


RWS embraces DEI and promotes equal opportunity, we are an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind. RWS is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. All employment decisions at RWS are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to race, religion, nationality, ethnicity, sex, age, disability, or sexual orientation. RWS will not tolerate discrimination based on any of these characteristics.

#LI-PR1505
descriptionPlain:
Join Our Global TrainAI Talent Pool! 
Are you passionate about Artificial Intelligence and eager to contribute to innovative projects? We are building a global talent network for individuals interested in AI-related roles. Whether you have experience in data annotation, machine learning, research, or AI-driven product development, we'd love to have you on board!

What We Offer:
- Paid opportunities to work on cutting-edge AI projects.
- Flexible and remote work.
- Continuous learning and development opportunities in the AI space.

Typical tasks we need talent for:
- Data annotation and labeling
- AI model training and evaluation
- Linguistics, content moderation, or other AI-fields

How to Apply:
Submit your application, and we'll reach out when an opportunity that matches your skills and interests becomes available!

descriptionPlain:
We are looking for AI Data Specialists to support the improvement of AI-generated content in English.
 
Job Type: Freelance
Location: Alabama (work from home)
Work Schedule: Part-time - 10+ hours per week. Flexible - work whenever you want.
Start Date: Immediately
Duration: TBC
Rate: 15 USD per hour (rates vary per country. If you are based elsewhere, the rates will be different)
 
Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional seeking flexible remote work? Are you interested in shaping the development and safety of today’s AI models?
 
What You’ll Do
The role involves performing diverse data-related tasks, including:
 
- Data collection, evaluation, and annotation.
- Pairwise comparisons.
- Counting tasks.
- Object tagging and labeling across different content types (audio, video, images, or collected data)
 
What we’re looking for:
- English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2)
- AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience in one or more of the following areas: machine learning tasks, data collection and preprocessing, data evaluation and quality assurance, and data annotation and labeling.
 
What We Offer
- Flexible schedule
- Opportunity to earn extra income
- Timely payments
- The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents

descriptionBodyPlain:
We are looking for AI Data Specialists to support the improvement of AI-generated content in Finnish.
 
Job Type: Freelance
Location: Work from home
Work Schedule: Part-time - 10+ hours per week. Flexible - work whenever you want.
Start Date: Immediately
Rate: 20 USD per hour (rates vary per country. If you are based elsewhere, the rates will be different)
 
Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional seeking flexible remote work? Are you interested in shaping the development and safety of today’s AI models?
 
What You’ll Do
The role involves performing diverse data-related tasks, including:

- Data collection, evaluation, and annotation.
- Pairwise comparisons.
- Counting tasks.
- Object tagging and labeling across different content types (audio, video, images, or collected data)
 
What we’re looking for:
- Native-level fluency in Finnish
- English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2)
- AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience in one or more of the following areas: machine learning tasks, data collection and preprocessing, data evaluation and quality assurance, and data annotation and labeling.
 
What We Offer
- Flexible schedule
- Opportunity  to earn extra income
- Timely payments
- The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents

descriptionPlain:
We are looking for AI Data Specialists to support the improvement of AI-generated content in Hebrew.
 
Job Type: Freelance
Location: Remote
Work Schedule: Part-time - 10+ hours per week. Flexible - work whenever you want.
Start Date: Immediately
Duration: Until the end of December 2025 (an extension is possible)
Rate: 13 USD per hour (rates vary per country. If you are based elsewhere, the rates will be different)
 
Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional seeking flexible remote work? Are you interested in shaping the development and safety of today’s AI models?
 
What You’ll Do
The task involves transcribing audio content by reviewing and editing existing Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) outputs. Participants must revise the ASR-generated text to accurately reflect the spoken audio, following the transcription and formatting guidelines provided by the Production team. This includes correcting errors, ensuring completeness, and maintaining consistency with the established standards.

What we’re looking for:
- Native-level fluency in Hebrew.
- English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2).
- AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience in one or more of the following areas: machine learning tasks, data collection and preprocessing, data evaluation and quality assurance, and data annotation and labeling.
 
What We Offer
- 100% remote work
- Flexible schedule
- Opportunity  to earn extra income
- Timely payments
- The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents

Please apply using a GMAIL account if you have one.

A VAT (Value Added Tax) number is a unique identifier assigned to registered businesses in many countries; an EIN (Employer Identification Number) is a similar identifier used in the US. A Private Individual does not have a business license. If you aren’t sure, you are probably a private individual.
 
RWS embraces DEI and promotes equal opportunity, we are an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind. RWS is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. All employment decisions at RWS are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to race, religion, nationality, ethnicity, sex, age, disability, or sexual orientation. RWS will not tolerate discrimination based on any of these characteristics.
descriptionPlain:
We are looking for AI Data Specialists to support the improvement of AI-generated content in English.
 
Job Type: Freelance
Location: North Carolina, work from home
Work Schedule: Part-time - 10+ hours per week. Flexible - work when available
Start Date: Immediately
Duration: TBC
Rate: 15 USD/hour
 
Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional seeking flexible remote work? Are you interested in shaping the development and safety of today’s AI models?
 
What You’ll Do
The role involves performing diverse data-related tasks, including:
 
- Data collection, evaluation, and annotation.
- Pairwise comparisons.
- Counting tasks.
- Object tagging and labeling across different content types (audio, video, images, or collected data)
 
What we’re looking for:
- English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2)
- AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience in one or more of the following areas: machine learning tasks, data collection and preprocessing, data evaluation and quality assurance, and data annotation and labeling.
 
What We Offer
- Flexible schedule
- Opportunity to earn extra income
- Timely payments
- The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents

Work Schedule: Part-time - 10+ hours per week. Flexible - work whenever you want.
Start Date: Immediately
Rate: 20 USD per hour (rates vary per country. If you are based elsewhere, the rates will be different)
 
Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional seeking flexible remote work? Are you interested in shaping the development and safety of today’s AI models?
 
What You’ll Do
The role involves performing diverse data-related tasks, including:

- Data collection, evaluation, and annotation.
- Pairwise comparisons.
- Counting tasks.
- Object tagging and labeling across different content types (audio, video, images, or collected data)
 
What we’re looking for:
- Native-level fluency in Swedish
- English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2)
- AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience in one or more of the following areas: machine learning tasks, data collection and preprocessing, data evaluation and quality assurance, and data annotation and labeling.
 
What We Offer
- Flexible schedule
- Opportunity  to earn extra income
- Timely payments
- The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents

A Freelancer is someone who has a business license and may have a VAT number or EIN for tax purposes. A VAT (Value Added Tax) number is a unique identifier assigned to registered businesses in many countries; an EIN (Employer Identification Number) is a similar identifier used in the US. A Private Individual does not have a business license. If you aren’t sure, you are probably a private individual.

A VAT (Value Added Tax) number is a unique identifier assigned to registered businesses in many countries; an EIN (Employer Identification Number) is a similar identifier used in the US. A Private Individual does not have a business license. If you aren’t sure, you are probably a private individual.
 
RWS embraces DEI and promotes equal opportunity, we are an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind. RWS is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. All employment decisions at RWS are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to race, religion, nationality, ethnicity, sex, age, disability, or sexual orientation. RWS will not tolerate discrimination based on any of these characteristics.

descriptionPlain:
We are looking for AI Data Specialists to support the improvement of AI-generated content in English.
 
Job Type: Freelance
Location: West Virginia, work from home
Work Schedule: Part-time - 10+ hours per week. Flexible - work when available
Start Date: Immediately
Duration: TBC
Rate: 15 USD/hour
 
Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional seeking flexible remote work? Are you interested in shaping the development and safety of today’s AI models?
 
What You’ll Do
The role involves performing diverse data-related tasks, including:
 
- Data collection, evaluation, and annotation.
- Pairwise comparisons.
- Counting tasks.
- Object tagging and labeling across different content types (audio, video, images, or collected data)
 
What we’re looking for:
- English Proficiency: Fluent or advanced proficiency in English (levels B2–C2)
- AI & Data Capabilities (Preferred): Experience in one or more of the following areas: machine learning tasks, data collection and preprocessing, data evaluation and quality assurance, and data annotation and labeling.
 
What We Offer
- Flexible schedule
- Opportunity to earn extra income
- Timely payments
- The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents

descriptionPlain:
We are looking for AI Language Annotator with native or near-native speaker fluency in Vietnamese and English skills to understand written instructions.
 
- Job Type: Freelance
- Start Date: Immediately
- Duration: This project is short-term. High-performing vendors may be considered for future opportunities. 
- Schedule: Flexible, work at your own availability. 2 to 4 hours daily.
- Rate: Rates vary per-country.
 
 
What You’ll Do:
 
The task requires work with pairs of advertisements (the original and the model-translated version) across different formats and platforms to identify critical translation errors while ensuring the ad still effectively promotes a product, service, event, or topic
 
Your input will play a vital role in training safer and more accurate AI systems!
 
 
Responsibilities: 
- Read and review both the input and output texts in their entirety, paying close attention to any differences
- Determine whether the task should be rejected based on issues such as loading errors, language mismatch, or inappropriate content
- Assess the output for accuracy and consistency, ensuring the meaning and key information are preserved
- Identify and document any issues by referencing specific text and explaining discrepancies between input and output
- Suggest minimal corrections, when possible, to improve the output while maintaining the original intent.
 
Requirements:
- Strong attention to detail with the ability to identify inconsistencies and subtle differences in written content
- Excellent reading comprehension and written communication skills in the required language(s)
- Ability to follow structured guidelines and make accurate, consistent judgment calls
- Experience in content review, proofreading, translation, or similar quality-focused roles.
 
Qualification Process:
- Submit application and complete an initial screening questionnaire
- Complete language assessments to evaluate proficiency in both Vietnamese and English
- Successfully pass internal evaluation to move forward in the process
- Complete a final qualification assessment based on project guidelines, focused on identifying and categorizing errors in translated content.
 
What We Offer
- Flexible schedule
- Opportunity to earn extra income
- Timely payments
- The job is ideal for students, part-timers, or stay-at-home parents
 
#LI-CS1

descriptionPlain:
We are looking for AI Specialists to join a Liverpool English voice evaluation project — a great entry point into ongoing work within one of our most active AI markets!
 
Job Type: Freelance
Location: Work from home
Work Schedule: ~3 hours (with strong potential for ongoing projects)
Start Date: Immediately
Rate: 15 EUR/hour (or 18 USD/hour if not UK-based)
 
Strong linguistic profiles may be invited to join our Transcription team for an additional 3 hours at a rate of 21 EUR/hour (or 25 USD/hour for those based outside the UK).
 
Help Shape the Future of AI
This short project offers practical exposure to AI evaluation workflows and contributes directly to improving how AI systems understand real spoken language.
 
This role involves interacting with an AI agent through voice calls to help ensure accurate speech understanding and transcription quality.
 
You will participate in controlled calls with an AI agent. The goal is to evaluate how well the agent understands spoken language in natural scenarios. Training will be provided, and it will be compensated if the project tasks are completed.
 
Your recordings will be used solely to generate transcriptions for intelligibility review.
Your voice recordings will not be used to train, develop, or appear in any product.

This role involves interacting with an AI agent through voice calls to help ensure accurate speech understanding and transcription quality.

lists.content:
• Make scripted and unscripted calls with an AI agent (you will complete 10-15 conversations).
  • Produce clear, natural speech following provided guidelines (each conversation lasts about 5 minutes).
  • Test and validate the AI’s ability to understand and interpret speech, and report any issues with intelligibility or misunderstanding (10-15 minutes per conversation).

• Native-level fluency in Liverpool English (Scouse)
  • Ability to complete a trial voice recording to verify accent.
  • AI Specialist background is highly preferred, but not mandatory.
  • Experience with speech recording is an advantage.
  • Strong communication skills.
  • Comfortable speaking clearly and naturally in a variety of prompts and scenarios.
  • Must sign a consent form before beginning the project.

• Timely, reliable payments.
  • Access to additional project opportunities through our TrainAI Community, where we regularly source contributors for similar tasks.
  • A short, flexible engagement ideal for gaining practical exposure to AI evaluation workflows.

A Freelancer is someone who has a business license and may have a VAT number or EIN for tax purposes. A VAT (Value Added Tax) number is a unique identifier assigned to a registered business in many countries; an EIN (Employer Identification Number) is a similar identifier used in the US. A Private Individual does not have a business license. If you aren’t sure, you are probably a private individual.

descriptionPlain:
We are looking for AI Specialists to join a Northern Irish English (Ulster English) voice evaluation project — a great entry point into ongoing work within one of our most active AI markets!
 
Job Type: Freelance
Location: Work from home
Work Schedule: ~3 hours (with strong potential for ongoing projects)
Start Date: Immediately
Rate: 15 EUR/hour (or 18 USD/hour if not UK-based)
 
Strong linguistic profiles may be invited to join our Transcription team for an additional 3 hours at a rate of 21 EUR/hour (or 25 USD/hour for those based outside the UK).
 
Help Shape the Future of AI
This short project offers practical exposure to AI evaluation workflows and contributes directly to improving how AI systems understand real spoken language.
 
This role involves interacting with an AI agent through voice calls to help ensure accurate speech understanding and transcription quality.
 
You will participate in controlled calls with an AI agent. The goal is to evaluate how well the agent understands spoken language in natural scenarios. Training will be provided, and it will be compensated if the project tasks are completed.
 
Your recordings will be used solely to generate transcriptions for intelligibility review.
Your voice recordings will not be used to train, develop, or appear in any product.

lists.content:
• Make scripted and unscripted calls with an AI agent (you will complete 10-15 conversations).
  • Produce clear, natural speech following provided guidelines (each conversation lasts about 5 minutes).
  • Test and validate the AI’s ability to understand and interpret speech, and report any issues with intelligibility or misunderstanding (10-15 minutes per conversation).

• Native-level fluency in Northern Irish English (Ulster English)
  • Ability to complete a trial voice recording to verify accent.
  • AI Specialist background is highly preferred, but not mandatory.
  • Experience with speech recording is an advantage.
  • Strong communication skills.
  • Comfortable speaking clearly and naturally in a variety of prompts and scenarios.
  • Must sign a consent form before beginning the project.

• Timely, reliable payments.
  • Access to additional project opportunities through our TrainAI Community, where we regularly source contributors for similar tasks.
  • A short, flexible engagement ideal for gaining practical exposure to AI evaluation workflows.

descriptionPlain:
We are hiring!

We are hiring! We are looking for AI Content Evaluators with native-level fluency in Danish, along with advanced English skills. In this role, you will support AI development by reviewing and evaluating content to ensure accuracy, clarity, and proper source attribution.

 Job Type: Part-Time
Duration: TBD
Schedule: Flexible, work at your own availability. Tasks typically require 4–8 hours to complete
Rate: 28 USD/hour

Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a native-level speaker of Danish with strong English skills and great attention to detail? This freelance opportunity allows you to work remotely on your own schedule while reviewing AI-generated content and helping improve the accuracy and reliability of AI systems used worldwide. 

What You’ll Do
This project involves a two-part task focused on quality assurance for the AI model. You will be utilizing your linguistic expertise to create data and then evaluate the resulting AI-generated content.

Responsibilities
- Read and synthesize content from PDF documents in Danish.
- Formulate clear, consistent questions based on the source material.
- Review AI-generated answers for accuracy, coherence, and cultural relevance.
- Evaluate the effectiveness and accuracy of the AI's source attribution.
- Adhere strictly to detailed annotation and fact-checking guidelines provided in English. 

Requirements- 
- Native speaker of Danish (fluency in Finnish, Norwegian, Dutch, or Swedish also considered for separate postings).
- Must currently reside in Denmark.
- University degree in Translation, Linguistics, or equivalent professional experience in a linguistically related field.
- Required to understand complex project instructions and complete the formal training.
- Desirable: Prior experience in the Technology and/or Marketing domains is highly desired. 

Benefits 
- Competitive Hourly Rate: 28 USD/hour.
- 100% remote freelance work with a flexible schedule.
- Contribute to the advancement of next-generation Generative AI.
- Be added to our global AI talent pool for ongoing and future projects.

Apply now to join and help shape the next generation of AI!

descriptionPlain:
We are looking for General AI Data Annotators - French (France) and English – US Based Only
Remote, Part-Time, Work from Home

- Job Type: Part-time employee (W2)
- Location: Remote from one of the following states: CA (except SF Bay Area), CO, FL, GA, IL, IN, MA, MN, NH, NJ, NC, NY (except NY City Area), OK, OR, PA, TN, TX, WA, WI.
- Schedule: 20 hours/week (approx. 4 hours per day, Monday–Friday)
- Compensation: $21.50/hour
- Start Date: As soon as possible

Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a student, recent graduate, stay-at-home parent, gig worker, or professional looking for part-time, flexible, remote work? Join our team and contribute to improving the reliability of today’s AI models.

What You’ll Do
- Review, score, and improve AI-generated responses-
- Evaluate prompts and responses across a wide range of topics
- Perform QA checks on other annotators’ work and provide feedback
- Correct responses and suggest improvements using natural language
(Full training provided)

Requirements
- Native-level fluency in French (France) and proficient in English
- Must be located in the USA
- Undergraduate degree preferred (Associate or Bachelor’s)
- Ability to work 20 hours per week. While the schedule is flexible, you’ll need to be reachable online from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM     during your first 10 business days for training scheduling and setup support.
- Detail-oriented, responsible, and communicative
- Reliable computer (Windows 10+ or macOS Catalina or newer) and high-speed internet

What We Offer
-Work from home, part-time role (W2)
- $21.50/hour with timely payments
- Flexible schedule to maintain work-life balance
- Great way to earn extra income while helping shape AI

Apply now to get started!

- Review, score, and improve AI-generated responses-
- Evaluate prompts and responses across a wide range of topics
- Perform QA checks on other annotators’ work and provide feedback
- Correct responses and suggest improvements using natural language
(Full training provided)

Requirements
- Native-level fluency in Thai and proficient in English
- Must be located in the USA
- Undergraduate degree preferred (Associate or Bachelor’s)
- Ability to work 20 hours per week. While the schedule is flexible, you’ll need to be reachable online from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM during your first 10 business days for training scheduling and setup support.
- Detail-oriented, responsible, and communicative
- Reliable computer (Windows 10+ or macOS Catalina or newer) and high-speed internet

What We Offer
-Work from home, part-time role (W2)
- $21.50/hour with timely payments
- Flexible schedule to maintain work-life balance
- Great way to earn extra income while helping shape AI

Apply now to get started!

descriptionPlain:
We are hiring!

We are hiring! We are looking for AI Content Evaluators with native-level fluency in Norwegian, along with advanced English skills. In this role, you will support AI development by reviewing and evaluating content to ensure accuracy, clarity, and proper source attribution.

 Job Type: Part-Time
Duration: TBD
Schedule: Flexible, work at your own availability. Tasks typically require 4–8 hours to complete
Rate: 30 USD/hour

Help Shape the Future of AI
Are you a native-level speaker of Norwegian with strong English skills and great attention to detail? This freelance opportunity allows you to work remotely on your own schedule while reviewing AI-generated content and helping improve the accuracy and reliability of AI systems used worldwide. 

What You’ll Do
This project involves a two-part task focused on quality assurance for the AI model. You will be utilizing your linguistic expertise to create data and then evaluate the resulting AI-generated content.

Responsibilities
- Read and synthesize content from PDF documents in Norwegian.
- Formulate clear, consistent questions based on the source material.
- Review AI-generated answers for accuracy, coherence, and cultural relevance.
- Evaluate the effectiveness and accuracy of the AI's source attribution.
- Adhere strictly to detailed annotation and fact-checking guidelines provided in English. 

Requirements- 
- Native speaker of Norwegian (fluency in Finnish, Swedish, Dutch, or Danish also considered for separate postings).
- Must currently reside in Norway.
- University degree in Translation, Linguistics, or equivalent professional experience in a linguistically related field.
- Required to understand complex project instructions and complete the formal training.
- Desirable: Prior experience in the Technology and/or Marketing domains is highly desired. 

Benefits 
- Competitive Hourly Rate: 30 USD/hour.
- 100% remote freelance work with a flexible schedule.
- Contribute to the advancement of next-generation Generative AI.
- Be added to our global AI talent pool for ongoing and future projects.

Apply now to join and help shape the next generation of AI!

additionalPlain:
Vendor Type

When applying, please select the option that best describes your working status.

Are you a Freelancer or Private Individual?
A Freelancer is someone who has a business license and may have a VAT number or EIN for tax purposes. A VAT (Value Added Tax) number is a unique identifier assigned to registered businesses in many countries; an EIN (Employer Identification Number) is a similar identifier used in the US. A Private Individual does not have a business license. If you aren’t sure, you are probably a private individual.

#LI-PR1505


RWS embraces DEI and promotes equal opportunity, we are an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind. RWS is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. All employment decisions at RWS are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to race, religion, nationality, ethnicity, sex, age, disability, or sexual orientation. RWS will not tolerate discrimination based on any of these characteristics.

descriptionPlain:
Overview:
Are you a web-savvy, search expert with a talent for finding things online by using just a few words? Do you want to influence the future of global AI search? If so, we want you on board!
Working on behalf of RWS, you will test and evaluate how our clients’ search engine responds to everyday searches from everyday people.
Using your search expertise, you will work through a variety of assignments playing a crucial part in enhancing AI data which will be used to improve the online search engine experience of our clients’ users.
 
You:
- Inquisitive by nature with a real interest in AI.
- Have excellent skills in online research.
- Enjoy working in a fast-paced environment.
- Continually maintain quality and accuracy SLAs.
- Have the self-discipline to stick to a schedule and get the work done despite the potential distractions of a home office.
- Be a critical thinker with ability to analyze information and assess its relevance or significance.


Quick overview of the flexible, part-time job:

Language: English and French proficiency
Location: France (Work from Home)
Schedule: E.g. 8-30 h/week. Avg. 15 h/weekly
Pay: Up to 13 EUR/hour

Who Should Apply: Ideal for freelancers, students, stay-at-home parents, or anyone seeking flexible remote work to improve AI models. No previous experience is required.

Role Description: Join RWS Group as an evaluator to enhance search engine results. Provide feedback on text, audio, images, and videos to refine AI data used by major search engines, social media sites, streaming platforms and more.

lists.content:
• Currently reside in France
  • Strong understanding of popular culture in your locale (France).
  • Commit to a minimum of 5 hours per week, maximum of 40 hours per week.
  • Must sign and adhere to project NDA
  • Have a smartphone and personal computer with reliable internet connection
  • Reliable antivirus software to protect your computer as you surf the web
  • Must pass training modules and a required test created by our client before commencing work
  • Only one Search Quality Rater per household 
  • Must be 18+ years old

• Flexible home-based work.
  • Work-life balance.
  • Potential side-hustle.
  • Payments via PayPal/Bank Account.
  • Access to more opportunities through our TrainAI Community.

additional:
Vendor Type

When applying, please select the option that best describes your working status.

Are you a Freelancer or Private Individual?
A Freelancer is someone who has a business license and may have a VAT number or EIN for tax purposes. A VAT (Value Added Tax) number is a unique identifier assigned to registered businesses in many countries; an EIN (Employer Identification Number) is a similar identifier used in the US. A Private Individual does not have a business license. If you aren’t sure, you are probably a private individual.

descriptionPlain:
Overview:
Are you a web-savvy, search expert with a talent for finding things online by using just a few words? Do you want to influence the future of global AI search? If so, we want you on board!
Working on behalf of RWS, you will test and evaluate how our clients’ search engine responds to everyday searches from everyday people.
Using your search expertise, you will work through a variety of assignments playing a crucial part in enhancing AI data which will be used to improve the online search engine experience of our clients’ users.
 
You:
- Inquisitive by nature with a real interest in AI.
- Have excellent skills in online research.
- Enjoy working in a fast-paced environment.
- Continually maintain quality and accuracy SLAs.
- Have the self-discipline to stick to a schedule and get the work done despite the potential distractions of a home office.
- Be a critical thinker with ability to analyze information and assess its relevance or significance.


Quick overview of the flexible, part-time job:

Language: English and Italian proficiency
Location: Italy (Work from Home)
Schedule: E.g. 8-30 h/week. Avg. 15 h/weekly
Pay: Up to 10 EUR/hour

Who Should Apply: Ideal for freelancers, students, stay-at-home parents, or anyone seeking flexible remote work to improve AI models. No previous experience is required.

Role Description: Join RWS Group as an evaluator to enhance search engine results. Provide feedback on text, audio, images, and videos to refine AI data used by major search engines, social media sites, streaming platforms and more.

lists.content:
• Currently reside in Italy
  • Strong understanding of popular culture in your locale (Italy).
  • Commit to a minimum of 5 hours per week, maximum of 40 hours per week.
  • Must sign and adhere to project NDA
  • Have a smartphone and personal computer with reliable internet connection
  • Reliable antivirus software to protect your computer as you surf the web
  • Must pass training modules and a required test created by our client before commencing work
  • Only one Search Quality Rater per household 
  • Must be 18+ years old

• Flexible home-based work.
  • Work-life balance.
  • Potential side-hustle.
  • Payments via PayPal/Bank Account.
  • Access to more opportunities through our TrainAI Community.

Quick overview of the flexible, part-time job:

Language: English and Japanese proficiency
Location: Japan (Work from Home)
Schedule: E.g. 8-30 h/week. Avg. 15 h/weekly
Pay: Up to 15 USD/hour equivalent to ~2300 JPY/hour

Who Should Apply: Ideal for freelancers, students, stay-at-home parents, or anyone seeking flexible remote work to improve AI models. No previous experience is required.

Role Description: Join RWS Group as an evaluator to enhance search engine results. Provide feedback on text, audio, images, and videos to refine AI data used by major search engines, social media sites, streaming platforms and more.

To be successful in the role, you will need to speak English on a B2 level (upper-intermediate) or higher. B2 is equivalent to: 
TOEIC Listening & Reading: 785 to 940 total score
IELTS: 5.5 to 6.0
TOEFL iBT: 72 to 94
Cambridge English Scale: 160 to 179

additionalPlain:
Vendor Type

When applying, please select the option that best describes your working status.

Are you a Freelancer or Private Individual?
A Freelancer is someone who has a business license and may have a VAT number or EIN for tax purposes. A VAT (Value Added Tax) number is a unique identifier assigned to registered businesses in many countries; an EIN (Employer Identification Number) is a similar identifier used in the US. A Private Individual does not have a business license. If you aren’t sure, you are probably a private individual.

#LI-PR1505


RWS embraces DEI and promotes equal opportunity, we are an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind. RWS is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. All employment decisions at RWS are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to race, religion, nationality, ethnicity, sex, age, disability, or sexual orientation. RWS will not tolerate discrimination based on any of these characteristics.
